programs.title: Karamo
programs.sub_title: Unlock: Do You Have a Secret Baby?; Truth: $1400 Is Missing!
programs.desc: Random women are calling Eve about her boyfriend, Michael, and she suspects he's cheating, but Michael insists he's been honest throughout the relationship -- with trust on the line, everything hangs in the balance as Karamo unlocks the phones; Brandi says $1,400 went missing and she believes her cousin, Damyjai, took it; Damyjai swears she has no reason to steal any money and wants to clear her name. A bond is now broken, but can it be restored? It's a case of whodunit on today's "Karamo"!
